operating_status.title: Operating Status
operating_status.description: One of: ACTIVE, CLOSED, UNCERTAIN. Base on evidence from Yelp/Google/website within the last 12 months.

contact_email.title: Contact Email
contact_email.description: Public contact email found on official website, Yelp business bio, Google listing, or reservation platform. If none found, leave blank.

positive_verbatim_quote.title: Positive Verbatim Quote
positive_verbatim_quote.description: EXACT verbatim text from a real public review (Yelp, Google, TripAdvisor) or the restaurant's own testimonial page. Must be 30-200 characters, no paraphrase, no composite. Must NOT contain blocked tokens (food poisoning, hospital, etc.) or promotional cliches (best restaurant in the world, 5 stars).

positive_source_platform.title: Positive Source Platform
positive_source_platform.description: Yelp, Google, TripAdvisor, or the business's own website

positive_source_url.title: Positive Source URL
positive_source_url.description: Direct URL to the review or testimonial page

positive_reviewer_tag.title: Positive Reviewer Tag
positive_reviewer_tag.description: Reviewer first name + last-name-initial + date if visible (e.g., 'Michael F., Aug 22 2024'). Used for provenance only, NOT inserted into outreach body.

positive_theme.title: Positive Theme
positive_theme.description: 5-10 word theme the positive quote expresses (e.g., 'longtime neighborhood spot with standout prime rib')

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Any disqualifiers found (chain, closed, hotel restaurant, too high profile) OR anything the operator should know
